text: I am enveloped in curiosity and anticipation as I step through this modern, glass-walled space. The bold letters 'R+D' invite me to ponder innovation and progress. The screens, texts, and unusual displays call forth an intellectual excitement—the sense that here, thoughts and possibilities are being tested and revealed. I feel like a participant in the unfolding narrative of invention, both humbled and inspired by the pursuit of knowledge around me.
